results.title: Constellation Brands AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Constellation Brands has begun integrating artificial intelligence and data analytics into its operations, though its AI initiatives remain in early stages compared to industry leaders. The company leverages AI through partnerships with Google Cloud for its direct-to-consumer (DTC) operations and uses AI-driven data platforms like SoundCommerce to unify customer data[1]. A senior supply chain executive recently completed AI strategy training through Northwestern Kellogg, indicating investment in AI leadership capabilities[2]. However, the company's AI hiring signals show only 3.7% of job postings mention AI, with notably zero AI mentions in engineering and data roles, suggesting limited organizational AI maturity[3].
...

AI hiring signals show limited organizational AI adoption with only 3.7% of job postings mentioning AI. Notably, zero AI mentions appear in Engineering/Tech and Data/Analytics roles, suggesting AI is not yet integrated into core technical functions. The highest AI mentions are in Customer Service (33.3%), indicating AI applications may be focused on customer-facing operations rather than technical innovation.

## AI Initiatives
...
### AI Leadership Development Program
...
Executive education in AI strategies for business transformation
...
Senior supply chain executive Lisa Brown completed Northwestern Kellogg's 'AI Strategies for Business Transformation' program, indicating investment in developing AI leadership capabilities across the organization.
...
### AI-Enhanced Supply Chain Intelligence
...
Partnership with Supplier.io to leverage AI for supply chain transparency and supplier diversity analytics
...
Uses purpose-built AI to enhance supply chain resilience, competitiveness and transparency, providing intelligent sourcing strategies and critical insights into supplier diversity and sustainability data across their supplier network.
...
What AI tools does Constellation Brands use?
...
Constellation uses SoundCommerce for AI-powered customer data analytics in their DTC business and Supplier.io for AI-enhanced supply chain intelligence and supplier diversity analytics.
...
The company partners with Supplier.io to leverage AI for supply chain transparency, resilience, and supplier diversity analytics, helping optimize sourcing strategies and sustainability metrics.
...
What is Constellation Brands' DTC AI strategy?
...
Their DTC strategy uses Google Cloud and SoundCommerce to unify customer data from 100+ endpoints, enabling AI-driven insights for marketing optimization, customer lifetime value analysis, and personalized experiences across their wine and spirits brands.
...
How mature is Constellation Brands' AI adoption?
...
AI adoption appears to be in early stages, with only 3.7% of job postings mentioning AI and zero mentions in engineering roles, though the company is investing in executive AI education and strategic partnerships.
...
Yes, through their partnership with SoundCommerce, they use AI to analyze customer behavior patterns, optimize marketing campaigns, and calculate customer lifetime value across their DTC portfolio of wine and spirits brands.

highlights:
Data Scientist Manager, Insights & Analytics at Constellation Brands
...
Data Science Manager at [Constellation Brands](https://www.linkedin.com/company/constellation-brands)
...
If there is one constant in this corner of the Universe that I am in charge of, it is that I love crunching data. I ventured off from the world of academia in 2012 and haven't looked back. Coming from a realm of theoretical and computational astrophysics, starting my own Science and Data Analysis Consulting company has allowed me to use all my data analysis techniques and experience to attack real world problems. When you come from a world of Astronomical data, Big Data is not intimidating. Let us know what challenges your company is facing and we will show you how our data science can help.

department is building the future of digital and automated financing solutions of Danske Bank and Applied Analytics are developing the underlying automated credit decisions and digital advice which have resulted in an automated, explainable and immediate time-to-decision for most companies applying.

results.title: Jason Taft
highlights:
Director of Technology Strategy & Innovation at [Constellation Brands](https://www.linkedin.com/company/constellation-brands)
...
I’m a forward-thinking executive technology leader with 30+ years of shaping business outcomes through emerging technologies, strategy, and innovation. My passion lies in translating the promise of cutting-edge tools—especially AI-native platforms—into measurable enterprise value and real-world impact. Over my career, I have led organizations through technology evolutions—from SOA to cloud-native and API-first architectures, advancing through service mesh and data mesh, and now driving AI-native platforms. This journey has included building enterprise-scale self-service platforms that empower teams to innovate and deliver at scale. I have a proven track record architecting next-generation digital and GenAI solutions, building and mentoring high-performing teams, and driving transformation across complex, full-stack environments. I’m a strong advocate for developer productivity, having delivered self-service platforms and tools that enable engineering teams to build, deploy, and scale AI-driven applications rapidly and securely. Equally comfortable setting visionary strategy with C-level stakeholders or rolling up my sleeves to accelerate AI adoption, I champion governance, security, and solution delivery efficiency for sustained growth. Recognized as a thought leader and catalyst for change, I help organizations move from vision to execution—enabling innovation, talent development, and competitive advantage in a rapidly evolving digital landscape.
...
Strategic leader driving digital and AI-native transformation, advancing measurable business value through emerging technology, platform architecture, and enterprise governance.
...
- Defined and executed enterprise digital and GenAI strategy, aligning technology investments and talent with high-impact business outcomes.
...

...

...
- Led modernization of architecture across cloud, service mesh, and data mesh (AWS, Azure, GCP, Snowflake), and championed domain-oriented data strategy to enable scalable, AI-ready data access.
...
- Co-authored and operationalized GenAI governance and risk policy, setting standards for responsible, secure AI adoption.

Just completed the AI for Leaders certificate program at The University of Texas at Austin!

It was a few months of intense learning from foundational concepts of how data science and machine learning powers AI to the latest on development of many LLMs. 

I’ve had the opportunity to dive deep into how artificial intelligence is shaping the future of business and leadership. The topics about business of AI, Building AI-first Organizations and the Capstone project brought me real direction on what is possibly next in my career.
...
Big thanks to the faculty at UT Austin for designing such a relevant and engaging program! #UTAustin #AIforLeaders #GenAI #ML
...
Classification with Ensemble Techniques and Neural Networks – sharing a highlight from my AI for Leaders learning journey.
...
I worked on a problem for an online education platform with data on potential customers (leads). The goal was to understand what factors contribute to lead conversion, evaluate different classification models, and identify the best predictors of conversion. Based on the analysis, I shared actionable recommendations to help improve their conversion rate.
...
Using the open-source tool KNIME, I built a machine learning workflow with models including pruned and unpruned Decision Trees, Random Forest, Neural Network, and Gradient Boosted Tree. I compared them using metrics like Accuracy, Recall, Precision, Sensitivity, Specificity, and F-measure to determine the most effective approach.
...
In this case, the pruned decision tree emerged as the best model for predicting lead conversions.
...
A few weeks ago I built a two-part project focused on driving AI adoption and a use case for the media industry.
...
Part 1: Strategic AI Planning & Execution
...
Worked on identifying and evaluating high-impact business applications of AI, followed by feasibility studies, ROI modeling, and build-vs-buy analysis. Performed risk assessments, built a POC, and developed estimates and roadmaps to guide product and tech teams on scalable AI initiative.
...
Part 2: AI for Content Optimization
...
Built a Linear Regression model for an OTT media service to increase first-day viewership of new contents. The model quantified the impact of key drivers—like genre, seasonality, release timing, ad impressions, and trailer views—helping business teams optimize for stronger content launches.
...
Applying these learnings was more than just a technical exercise — it felt like unlocking a new way of thinking.
...
and strategic impact. This
...

results.title: Gerardo Antonio Garcia Silva
highlights:
Solution Architect at [Constellation Brands](https://www.linkedin.com/company/constellation-brands)
...
### Solution Architect at [Constellation Brands](https://www.linkedin.com/company/constellation-brands) (Current)
...
Overview : Constellation Brands is a leading international producer and marketer of beer, wine, and spirits. They have established a new group called the “Data Pod,” a dedicated team within the Beer Operations Product group focused on understanding business needs and processes to provide best-in-class data solutions. This group works efficiently and aligns closely with Data & Analytics (D&A), other Product & Platform teams, and Enterprise Architecture. I am working as a Solution Architect, where I am building our internal data analytics ecosystem and an internal data engineering function that is as effective and reliable as any outside SaaS product. I have the opportunity and responsibility of shaping our data architecture Responsibilities : Collaborate with stakeholders to understand business requirements and translate them into technical solutions. Design the overall architecture of the data integration system, including, AWS tools , Snowflake, DataSphere, SAP Analytic Cloud , Airflow , DBT and other tools. Select appropriate technologies and tools for data extraction, transformation, and loading using the tool available in the enterprise. Provide guidance and technical leadership to the data engineering team, ensuring integration solutions align with the overall architecture. Projects: Establish tools to consume Data from SAP ERP to Power BI. Design solution to create a sap part library web using React and Datasphere. Establish connection between S3 to Snowflake using Snowpipe. Build DBT project and infrastructure. Design Beer Operation Data Layer 0.1 using Streamlit Design Beer Operation Data Layer 1.0 using Data tools inside the company Design Cost Report using Power BI , Power Apps, AWS Tools, DBT , Snowflake, SAP tools Design Statistical Process Control (SPC) using Power BI, Power Apps, AWS Tools, DBT, Snowflake, SAP tools. Tools: Snowflake DBT SAP Datasphere SAP Analytic Cloud Amazon S3 AWS Glue Airflow Power Apps Power BI

“Jenn was brought in to be our lead integration developer for our Data Management space at Constellation Brands, Inc. Without Jenn, we could not have been successful in getting our master data out of Informatica and into the consuming systems such as Snowflake, our Enterprise Data Warehouse, our SAP S4 Hana, along with standard consumption APIs to expose our master data to all areas of the company. She is an intelligent person who asks very detailed questions to prevent issues from happening in the first place and if anything did arise related to integrations, she was very capable of finding the problem and implementing the solution. I would recommend Jenn to any company looking for a highly capable and personable resource in the integration space.”
...
“Jenn was a key piece to the success of our integration team while at Constellation Brands.  Throughout her tenure, she was our integration lead for several critical, time sensitive projects.  In this capacity, she worked directly with our stakeholders to clarify requirements, design/architect solutions, and lead execution of integration delivery. While leading these activities, Jenn both developed herself, and lead a number of contract resources through all SDLC activities.  Additionally, Jenn was a key contributor to ongoing standards and best practices across our team often taking lead responsibilities through various initiatives. From a technical skillsets perspective, Jenn was able to rapidly learn a net new integration platform (MuleSoft AnyPoint) and make immediate contributions through program delivery.  I would not hesitate to recommend Jenn for any future roles, she would be an incredible team member to add at any company.”

results.title: Senior Staff Generative AI Scientist | Wfh
highlights:
Senior Staff Generative AI Scientist | Wfh
...
# Senior Staff Generative AI Scientist
...
The Sr Staff AI Scientist - Generative AI will apply knowledge and experience to real world problems and seek to utilize their skills reduce the cost of healthcare and improve health quality and outcomes. With access to dedicated on premise and cloud based big data solutions, the team can work with a vast amount of structured and unstructured data including claims, membership, physician demographics, medical records and others to begin to solve some of the most pressing healthcare issues of our time. A Data Scientist at Cotiviti will be given the opportunity to work directly with a team of healthcare professionals including analysts, clinicians, coding specialists, auditors and innovators to set aggressive goals and execute on them with the team. This is for an ambitious technologist, with the flexibility and personal drive to succeed in a dynamic environment where they are judged based on their direct impact to business outcomes.
...
- As a Sr Staff AI Scientist - Generative AI within Cotiviti you will be responsible for delivering solutions that help our clients identify payment integrity issues, reduce the cost of healthcare processes, or improve the quality of healthcare outcomes. You will work as part of a team and will be individually responsible for the delivery of value associated with your projects. You will be expected to follow processes and practices that allow your models to be incorporated into our machine learning platform for production execution and monitoring, however, initial exploratory data analysis allows for more flexible experimentation to discover solutions to the business problems presented.
...
- Work with key stakeholders within Research and Development as well as Operations, along with product management to assess the potential value and risks associated with business problems that have the potential to be solved using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence techniques.
...
- Develop an exploratory data analysis approach to verify the initial hypothesis associated with potential Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning use cases.
...
- Document your approach, thinking and results in standard approaches to allow other data scientists to collaborate with you on this work.
...
- Prepare your final trained model and develop a validation test set for QA.
...
- Work with production operations to deploy your model into production and support them in monitoring model performance.
...
- Participate in other data science teams collaborating with your peers to support their projects.
...
- Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team.
...
- Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform.
...
- Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption.
...
- Qualifications
- PhD or Graduate degree in a quantitative discipline such as Computer Science/Engineering, Statistics, Operations Research covering Advanced Statistics, Machine learning and AI.
...
- Experience with the latest techniques in natural language processing including transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, measuring/benchmarking and deploying LLMs with tools such as HuggingFace, Langchain, LLAMA/Mistral and OpenAI, vector databases.
...
- 9+ years of hands-on data science/AI experience, using typical machine learning and data science tools including pandas, scikit-learn, keras, nltk, and TensorFlow/PyTorch, GPU.
...
- Experience building production-grade machine learning deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP.
...
- Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets.
...
- Experience communicating technical concepts to non
...
- Passion for collaboration, learn it all mindset and driving value with AI.
...
Date of posting: 1/14/2026

- We are looking for a motivated Data Scientist ready to take us to the next level! If you have designing, developing, and deploying state-of-the-art agentic systems, automation solutions, and generative AI applications to enable autonomous decision-making and optimize business processes and are looking for your next career move, apply now
- Job Description
- We are looking for a Data Scientist - Agentic Developer to design cutting-edge AI solutions and autonomous systems focused on agentic workflows and generative AI technologies. This position will be full-time and remote.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy multi-agent systems and agentic applications using frameworks like AutoGen, LangGraph, CrewAI, or similar
...
Use ML, deep learning, and Generative AI tools to design, evangelize, and implement state-of-the-art solutions
...
Define and implement best practices for building, testing, and deploying scalable AI solutions, with a focus on generative models and LLMs using proprietary or open-source models
...
Drive successful business outcomes by designing and building cloud-hosted Generative AI solutions
...
Work with public cloud (AWS) and on-premises infrastructure for deploying LLMs, agents, and orchestration systems
...
Evaluate, build, and fine-tune ML models and LLMs to solve complex business problems
...
Stay abreast of latest developments in agentic AI, autonomous systems, language models, and generative AI technologies.
...

- Required:
- BE, Master's or Ph.D. in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, or equivalent practical experience
...
4-8 years of overall technical experience with 0-2 years of hands-on experience in Generative AI and LLM technologies
...
1+ years of experience building agentic systems, workflow automation, or autonomous AI applications
...
Deep hands-on experience with agentic frameworks (AutoGen, LangGraph, CrewAI, Agency Swarm, or similar)
...
Expertise in OpenAPI standards, Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocols, and Model Context Protocol (MCP)
...
Proven track record of deploying and optimizing LLM models for inference in production environments
...
Extensive experience with LLM orchestration frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex required)
...
Hands-on experience with Amazon Bedrock, SageMaker JumpStart, and other cloud-based LLM platforms
...
Expertise in RAG architectures, Fine-tuning techniques, and Prompt Engineering
...
Expert in NLP techniques and deep learning libraries (Transformer models, LSTM, BiLSTM, CNN, BERT, GPT, T5)
...
Proficiency with ML frameworks: TensorFlow, PyTorch, Hugging Face Transformers, scikit-learn
...
Hands-on experience in MLOps/LLMOps including data pipelines, model training/refinement, validation, drift management, and serving
...
Experience with containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) and CI/CD pipelines for ML systems
...
Knowledge of monitoring, logging, and observability tools for production AI systems
...
Knowledge of reinforcement learning and agent training methodologies
...
Contributions to open-source AI/ML projects
...
Publications or patents in AI/ML domain

results.title: Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote) | Wfh
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote) | Wfh
...
# Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote)
...
Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity)
...
Department: Data Science
...
Trust is the foundation of a vibrant Airbnb community. The Content Integrity Data Science team helps build and protect that trust by ensuring that the content on Airbnb, including listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated experiences, is accurate, authentic and aligned with our policies and community standards.
...
We partner closely with product, engineering, policy and operations teams to develop advanced AI-driven content understanding systems, scale effective human-in-the-loop workflows and proactively defend against emerging content risks, so guests and hosts can interact with confidence.
...
This role is unique in that it directly improves the safety, trust, and quality of real-world user experiences by advancing Airbnb’s ability to understand, interpret and act on content at scale. You will help shape how the platform reasons about listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated content by building the next generation of Trust Content Understanding Models.
...
- The ideal candidate is a motivated and talented “full-stack” Data Scientist with strong applied ML intuition and a bias toward impact, who can own and drive forward challenging, high-visibility initiatives such as:
...
- Advance Airbnb’s content integrity capabilities by building Natural Language Processing (NLP) and LLM-based models that understand intent, policy compliance, quality and risk across listings, profiles, and user communications
...
- Develop high-performing models for detecting problematic or misleading content, including text classification, semantic similarity, information extraction and generative model-based reasoning for policy interpretation and enforcement
...
- Design and optimize human-in-the-loop Machine Learning (ML) systems for content review, labeling, escalation and continuous model improvement
...
- Build systems to detect emerging content risks and abuse patterns across regions, cohorts and surfaces using statistical, ML and representation-learning approaches
...
- Design intelligent sampling and evaluation strategies to measure rare events, policy recall, false positives/negatives and model blind spots in large-scale content systems
...
- Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning: Build and deploy production AI/ML systems for content integrity and trust content understanding, including feature engineering, model development and evaluation, thresholding, error analysis and end-to-end model lifecycle management. This includes working with NLP and LLM-based models in real production settings.
...
- Your Expertise:
...
- 5+ years of industry experience in a quantitative analysis role with a Master’s degree in a quantitative field (computer science, statistics etc.), or 2+ years of experience with a Ph.D.
...
- State-of-the-art knowledge of AI/ML models
- Hands-on experience building, evaluating, and deploying NLP and LLM-based solutions, including text classification, information extraction, semantic understanding or generative applications.
...
- Working knowledge of causal inference
...
This position is US - Remote Eligible. The role may include occasional work at an Airbnb office or attendance at offsites, as agreed to with your manager. While the position is Remote Eligible, you must live in a state where Airbnb, Inc. has a registered entity. Click here for the up-to-date list of excluded states. This list is continuously evolving, so please check back with us if the state you live in is on the exclusion list. If your position is employed by another Airbnb entity, your recruiter will inform you what states you are eligible to work from.

results.title: [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II | Wfh
highlights:
# [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II
...
Note: The job is a remote job and is open to candidates in USA. Cotiviti is a healthcare technology company focused on delivering better care at lower costs through advanced technology and data analytics. The Senior Generative AI Scientist II will work with a team to solve healthcare issues using machine learning and AI techniques, delivering value through innovative data solutions. Responsibilities • Work with key stakeholders within Research and Development as well as Business Operations, along with Product Management to assess the potential value and risks associated with business problems that have the potential to be solved using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence techniques • Develop an exploratory data analysis approach to verify the initial hypothesis associated with potential Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning use cases • Document your approach, thinking and results in standard approaches to allow other data scientists to collaborate with you on this work • Prepare your final trained model and develop a validation test set for QA • Work with ML Ops/Production operations to deploy your model into production and support them in monitoring model performance • Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform • Participate in other data science initiatives, collaborating with your peers to support their projects • Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team • Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption • Complete all responsibilities as outlined in the annual performance review and/or goal setting • Complete all special projects and other duties as assigned • Must be able to perform duties with or without reasonable accommodation Skills • Graduate degree in a quantitative discipline such as Computer Science/Engineering, Statistics, Operations Research covering Advanced Statistics, Machine learning and AI • Experience with the latest techniques in natural language processing including transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, measuring/benchmarking and deploying LLMs with tools such as HuggingFace, Langchain, LLAMA/Mistral and OpenAI, vector databases • 5+ years of hands-on data science/AI experience, using typical machine learning and data science tools including pandas, scikit-learn, keras, nltk, and TensorFlow/PyTorch, GPU • Experience building production-grade machine learning deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP • Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets • Experience communicating technical concepts to non-technical and technical audiences is a plus • Flexibility to work with global teams as well geographically dispersed US based teams • Professional with ability to properly handle confidential information • Ability to work within a matrixed organization • Proficiency in all required skills and competencies above Benefits • Medical • Dental • Vision • Disability • Life insurance coverage • 401(k) savings plans • Paid family leave • 9 paid holidays per year • 17-27 days of Paid Time Off (PTO) per year, depending on specific level and length of service with Cotiviti. Company Overview • Cotiviti enables healthcare organizations to deliver better care at lower cost through advanced technology and data analytics that improve the quality and sustainability of healthcare in the United States. It was founded in 1979, and is headquartered in South Jordan, UT, US, with a workforce of 5001-10000 employees. Its website is Company H1B Sponsorship • Cotiviti has a track record of offering H1B sponsorships, with 165 in 2025, 118 in 2024, 90 in 2023, 102 in 2022, 72 in 2021, 67 in 2020. Please note that this does not guarantee sponsorship for this specific role.

Trust is the foundation of a vibrant Airbnb community. The Content Integrity Data Science team helps build and protect that trust by ensuring that the content on Airbnb, including listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated experiences, is accurate, authentic and aligned with our policies and community standards.

results.title: Senior, Data Scientist at Walmart | Jeremy
highlights:
# Senior, Data Scientist
...
Sunnyvale, CAHybridSeniorML / AI
...
Senior ML engineer on Walmart's Catalog Data Science team building production GenAI and deep learning models for product attribute extraction, classification, and catalog optimization at petabyte scale.
...
About Team The Catalog Data Science Team at Walmart Global Tech is focused on using the latest research in generative AI (GenAI), artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning (ML), statistics, deep learning, computer vision and optimization to implement solutions that ensure Walmart’s product catalog is accurate, complete, and optimized for customer experience. Our team tackles complex data science and ML engineering challenges related to product classification, attribute extraction, trust & safety, and catalog optimization, empowering next-generation retail use cases. We take pride in writing solid production code in Python, deploying and supporting model services and pipelines, and pushing the boundaries in latency, throughput, and scalability.
...
As a Senior Data Scientist (Machine Learning Engineer) on the Catalog Data Quality team, you will collaborate with other Data Scientists and ML Engineers to develop, deploy, and scale machine learning models in production to extract attributes from product information. You will play a key role in supporting the attribute extraction platform and catalog data quality solutions — adding capabilities and driving adoption of GenAI-powered solutions to increase the coverage and accuracy of the Walmart's product catalog. The Data Science and ML Engineering community at Walmart Global Tech is active in most of the Hack events, utilizing the petabytes of data at our disposal, to build some of the coolest ideas. All the work we do at Walmart Global Tech will eventually benefit our operations & our associates, helping Customers Save Money to Live Better.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy AI/ML, NLP, LLM models into production environments with a focus on reliability and scalability. Own the full model lifecycle — from experimentation and offline evaluation through serving, monitoring, and iterative improvement in production.
...
- Demonstrated history of strong hands-on experience in AI/ML modeling
...
- Hands-on experience with Generative AI technologies: LLMs, multimodal models, RAG architectures, prompt engineering, and fine-tuning (LoRA/QLoRA)
...
- Prior Experience in building GenAI, DL, Vision-based models.
